title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Volkswagen India Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Volkswagen India Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Volkswagen India Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!
